creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is a duplicate PR, and a known problem.  I'm afraid there's no 
immediate solution until Robert Nordier finishes his DOSFS rewrite, 
though he did send me some stand-alone DOSfs reading code which I may 
try to integrate into sysinstall as a temporary work-around.  This won't, 
however, help you much currently, I'm sorry to say.
